programs.title: Signs Of A Psychopath 2
programs.desc: Profiles of the most brutal murderers of modern times.Viewers will see film materials as well as interviews with the killers themselves.They reveal their terrifying personality traits.

programs.title: Signs Of A Psychopath
programs.sub_title: I guess this is the end for me
programs.desc: Mania of grandeur, sadism, artificial charm or lack of empathy are just a few of the signs of psychopathy.In the program, viewers will learn about the most brutal murderers of modern times.
